steps.title: Use project leaders' rankings
steps.content: The planner wants advertisements aimed at project leaders to emphasize pollination. The supporting data must therefore show that project leaders rank pollination especially highly among the listed urban agriculture benefits.

steps.title: Ignore weaker comparisons
steps.content: Choice A concerns genetic variability and the general public, not why pollination should be emphasized to project leaders. Choice B compares project leaders with stakeholders, not project leaders' own priorities. Choice D contradicts the planner's conclusion. The table shows pollination ranked above the other listed services for project leaders. The answer is C.
